description: CompositionBlack and blue printed round neck kurta made of 100% cotton, has a slit neckline, short sleeves and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia have been inspired by the street fads that are currently trending and have added this to their latest collection. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with denims and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
